creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

The problem isn't fixed, only worked around. At least client/Makefile.am 
does not list full dependencies and likely lacks some _DEPENDENCIES that 
list libdconf. This problem is more serious than not supporting parallel 
builds, but can also cause incomplete rebuilds after changes.  Please 
take this to the upstream maintainers and leave the PR open or 
suspended.
